description: P4 Strength-only cutter. 28yo male, 95kg/180cm (BMI ~29.3), very active. 4-day strength split (no running), deliberate kcal deficit, manual-only logging (no wearable). Today is strength_upper. Stresses persona-replay's no-wearable + nutrition-deficit shape.

rationale: Soreness moderate, energy moderate; manual readiness signal supports proceeding with the planned upper day.
No wearable evidence available; recommendation rests on subjective signal.
Persona's intent has zero running per week; no running session is on plan today or this week.
Rest-day recommendation is the persona-correct shape on a strength-only program.
Persona's sleep window targets 23:00-07:00; recent average ~7h is at the bottom of the target range while in deficit.
Earlier bedtime supports recovery from the 4-day strength load while cutting.
Subjective stress score 3 sits at routine baseline; no escalation signal.
Today's strength_upper is on the persona's 4-day split.
Recent volumes track persona baseline at ~8000kg session despite the deficit.
Persona is in deliberate cut at ~2700 kcal / 200g protein; recent intake tracks the deficit closely.
Reduce-deficit advisory caps the rate of weight loss to preserve strength performance during the cut.
